// open-source · community-driven

The Fresher's Interview Playbook

A community-built bank of web development interview questions with model answers — for Node.js / NestJS · React · MySQL aspirants. Add yours via a Markdown pull request.

15 questions and growing

3 Q

Backend

HTTP, Node, NestJS, auth, APIs

Browse → 3 Q

Frontend

JavaScript, React, CSS, the web

Browse → 3 Q

Database

MySQL, SQL, modelling, indexing

Browse → 3 Q

AI & LLMs

Concepts, RAG, APIs, prompting

Browse → 3 Q

General & HR

Git, DSA, OOP, behavioural

Browse →

Open-source · add a question by opening a PR with a Markdown file. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
